calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Petitioner: Sarah L. Mandel-Anthony, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Marshall Clay Tobin.
The Court further orders the gender of Marshall Clay Tobin is changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Off Calendar
